name: Card Spotlight
summary: A card component with a mouse-tracking spotlight effect that reveals an animated grid pattern on hover.
detailedDescription: Card Spotlight creates an interactive card with a radial gradient spotlight that follows the mouse cursor position. The component uses Framer Motion's useMotionValue to track mouse coordinates relative to the card, creating a spotlight mask that reveals a CanvasRevealEffect with animated dots when hovering. The spotlight uses a radial gradient mask image that positions a circle at the mouse X/Y coordinates, with the radius configurable via props. When hovering, the CanvasRevealEffect displays animated blue and purple dots that create a subtle particle reveal effect. The card features a dark border and background by default, with smooth opacity transitions for the spotlight overlay. This effect is ideal for feature cards, pricing cards, or any content that benefits from interactive hover states that draw attention to specific areas based on cursor position.
purpose: Create interactive hover effects that respond to mouse position
Highlight card content with a dynamic spotlight reveal
Add visual depth through layered gradient and particle effects
behavior: Tracks mouse position using motion values for real-time spotlight following
Reveals spotlight overlay with opacity transition on hover enter/leave
Displays CanvasRevealEffect animated dots only when actively hovering
Uses radial gradient mask to create soft-edged circular spotlight
Supports customizable radius, color, and child content
visualCharacteristics: Animated dot grid reveals in spotlight area
Blue and purple color gradient particles
Rounded corners with inset glow effect
recommendations: Best for premium landing page sections and hero compositions.
Pairs well with testimonials, feature grids, and product highlight sections.
